mapper.sql: id, material_code, material_desc, material_unit, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, plan_date, amount, type, is_delete, create_time, update_time, tenant_id
mapper.insert: insert into `pl_demand_plan_material_detail` (id, material_code, material_desc, material_unit, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, plan_date, amount, type, is_delete, create_time, update_time, tenant_id ) values (#{id},#{materialCode}, #{materialDesc}, #{materialUnit}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{logicalPlantName}, #{planDate}, #{amount}, #{type}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime}, #{tenantId} )
mapper.update:
update `pl_demand_plan_material_detail`
material_code = #{materialCode},
material_desc = #{materialDesc},
material_unit = #{materialUnit},
logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo},
logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName},
plan_date = #{planDate},
amount = #{amount},
type = #{type},
is_delete = #{isDelete},
update_time = #{updateTime},
tenant_id = #{tenantId},
where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select
from `pl_demand_plan_material_detail` where is_delete != 1 and (material_code, logical_plant_no, type, tenant_id) IN
(#{record.materialCode}, #{record.logicalPlantNo}, #{record.type}, #{record.tenantId})
select material_code, logical_plant_no, tenant_id from `pl_demand_plan_material_detail` where is_delete != 1 and plan_date >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(),'%Y/%m/%d')

insert.if:
insert into `pl_demand_plan_material_detail` (material_code, material_desc, material_unit, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, plan_date, amount, type, tenant_id, create_time, update_time) values
(#{record.materialCode}, #{record.materialDesc}, #{record.materialUnit}, #{record.logicalPlantNo}, #{record.logicalPlantName}, #{record.planDate}, #{record.amount}, #{record.type}, #{record.tenantId}, now(), now()) ;
